Rather than say anything, Leslie took one look at me and turned back to her blouse. I wasn’t sure what was going on; this wasn’t the Leslie I’d met only days earlier. Trying once more to be friendly, I said, “It’s a lovely day, isn’t it?”

“I wouldn’t know; I’ve been stuck inside all day.”

I don’t know why, but I really wanted Leslie to speak to me. I poured through my mind for anything about what woman talked about. I was about to say something when I suddenly felt a sharp pain in my back. “God, my back is killing me.” Reaching around to rub my back, I said, “I think these...”

Throwing her wet towel on the counter, Leslie turned to me and said, “Look, I know your type: you think you can use your looks to bag yourself a rich husband, right?”

I was taken aback by Leslie’s remark, “Hey...”

With her best approximation of a whiny voice, Leslie said, “Oh I spent $10,000 on a boob job, now I have back problems.” Looking at me, in her normal voice, I said, “You got what you asked for; don’t complain to me if you’ve got buyer’s remorse.”

“Whoa, you’re way off base.” Trying my best to remain calm, I said, “You don’t know who I am.”

Having given up on her blouse, Leslie said, “Do you think I care?”

I found myself on the verge of tears as Leslie left the bathroom; I hadn’t expected such a verbal onslaught from her. After composing myself, I walked out of the bathroom and met up with the driver. Looking at me as we walked towards the elevators, he said, “Are you okay, ma’am?”

Wiping some stray tears, I said, “I’m fine; I guess she’s just having a difficult day.”

We rode the elevator to the 5th floor in silence; eventually finding ourselves outside of my hotel room. While I fumbled with the keycard, the driver said, “I hope you won’t let what happened ruin your day, ma’am.” Smiling, he said, “From what I’ve heard, this resort has a very nice spa – perhaps you could get a message.”

Opening the door a crack, I said, “I appreciate the suggestion; but I’m not sure I’m ready for that just yet.” Turning to him, I said, “I think I need more time to adjust before I let someone rub their hands on my body. I’ll probably just go to the pool or something.”

The driver nodded in understanding before turning to walk down the hall. I waited until he turned the corner before entering my room. Closing the door behind me, I was surprised to see that my room was actually an expansive suite.
11111111111111111111111311111.title: Arriving at the Hotel

111111111111111111111113111111.content:
The first thought that entered my mind as I stood in the foyer was just how expansive the suite was. There was a sitting area off to one side, with a lovely view of the beach, as well as a full-size kitchen.

Wow, in awe I thought, I guess it pays to have a ton of money. Kicking off my heels, breathing a sigh of relief once they were off, I walked further into the room.

Placing my purse on a table, I figured I would explore the rest of the place before sitting down to figure out my next moves. The bedroom included a king-sized bed with a door leading to an enclosed porch.

A quick look in the bathroom revealed a Jacuzzi. I’ll be putting that to use. Feeling an urge to look in the closet, I wasn’t all that surprised to find several outfits like the kind you’d wear to a nightclub. That makes sense; newly divorced, might want to have some fun.

I took note of a particularly fancy gown hanging off to one side. Closing the closet door, I walked back into the main room. Taking a seat on the couch, I wondered what I should do next.

The part of me that was still a teenage boy wanted to explore my new body, but I decided that could wait until this evening. After a few minutes of indecision, I eventually decided to hit the pool. Sure beats being in school right now.

Getting up, I returned to the bedroom go get changed; my thoughts turning to my friends and family. Wonder how they’ll handle seeing the new me.
111111111111111111111113111111.title: Exploring the Suite

1111111111111111111111131111111.content:
I stepped out of my bathroom wearing a one-piece bathing suit. I had briefly considered wearing a bikini, but I decided it was best not to rush things. After all, I thought to myself, I’ve got this body for the next two years. My phone started ringing as I approached the bed; throwing my clothes on the bed, I walked out to the main room to get my phone.

I didn’t reach it in time; I was disappointed about that until I saw who it was that had called: my husband Michael. God, it’s weird to think I have a husband now. I got annoyed once I saw he’d called me ten times in the last 5 minutes. “Okay.” Looking at the phone, I said, “Amelia told me he might call."

I was about to block his number when he called again. I briefly considered letting it go to voicemail, until I decided to nip this problem in the bud. Taking a deep breath, I answered the call and said, “You have to stop calling me, Michael.”

“Well sorry for being concerned about you.” Sounding upset, Michael said, “It’s normal to get worried when someone fails to answer 10 separate phone calls.”

“Forgive me if I don't jump at the chance to talk with my cheating husband." Getting angry, I said, "Let me guess; you're calling to tell me you got your secretary pregnant?"

“Amelia, what are you talking about?” his voice a mixture of confusion and concern, Michael said, “Are you feeling alright?”

“Listen Michael; I’m going to get a restraining order if you don’t stop calling me.”

I ended the call before Michael had a chance to respond. Knowing he’d call back; I quickly went into my contacts and blocked his number. What a way to start my first day as a woman.

Putting my phone back on the counter, I was more than ready to spend a relaxing afternoon by the pool. Returning to the bedroom, I grabbed a few things: some lotion, sunglasses, and a romance novel. I wasn’t thrilled about the romance novel, but I figured it wouldn’t be wise to make any changes right away.

Once I had everything I needed, I left the room; satisfied that I didn’t have to worry about Michael for the time being. Right now, my chief concern was finding a relaxing spot by the pool.
1111111111111111111111131111111.title: An Unwelcome Phone Call

11111111111111111111111311111111.content:
I took the elevator down to the lobby; spotting Leslie in the distance as I made my way to the pool. Thinking back to our encounter in the restroom, I briefly considered approaching her; only to realize it would make things worse.

Stepping out onto the pool deck, I saw that it was practically empty; save for a few college age girls working on their tans and some guys hanging around the bar. Something occurred to me as I slowly made my way to a nearby lounge chair – I wasn’t attracted to the girls at all, and I wasn’t bothered by that.

I took my seat and was applying some lotion when a pool boy approached me, “Good afternoon Ms. Anderson; could I interest you in your usual drink?”

I panicked for a moment; it hadn’t occurred to me that Amelia would be a regular at the pool, let alone that the staff would know her drink. The problem was that I didn’t know what it was; but rather than draw attention to myself, I said, “Sure, why not.”

As the writer walked off, I hoped Amelia wasn’t the type to order something loaded with alcohol. This was my first alcoholic beverage and I didn’t want to bite off more than I could chew.

I was reading my book when the waiter came back with an orange-colored drink. Handing it to me, he said, “Here’s your fuzzy navel, Ms. Anderson; if you need anything else, let me know.”

Taking a sip of the drink as he walked off. I was impressed by the taste. This isn’t half bad. Taking another sip before placing the glass on the table next to me, I made a note to familiarize myself with the resort’s drink menu.

Going back to my book, I was about to start reading when I noticed one of the guys from the pool approaching me. Wonder what this is all about?

The guy, a tall athletic guy with brown hair, stopped at the foot of my chair. My best guess was that he was in his early 20s; and I figured he was with the girls, judging by the looks they were giving me. Looking me over, he said, “Hey there, beautiful. Mind if I join you?”

In all honesty I would have preferred he didn’t, but I couldn’t pass up the chance to practice flirting. “Sure, why not.”

Taking the seat next to me, he said, “My name’s Tucker. What’s yours?”

With a smile, I said, “Hello Tucker, my name’s Amelia.”

“I’ve seen you around the last few days.” His gaze shifting to my chest, Tucker said, “I hope I’m not being too forward; but you’re the most beautiful woman I’ve ever seen.”

I mentally rolled my eyes; even with my limited flirting experience I could tell he was simply saying that. I noticed one of the girls glaring at me; so, putting two and two together, I figured he was flirting with me to get a rise out of her. Forcing a smile on my face, I said, “Why thank you, Tucker.”

“So, Amelia; what are you doing?”

“Right now? Just soaking up some sun and enjoying my Fuzzy Navel.”

“And once your glass is empty, and the sun goes down?”

“I haven’t really given that much thought, to be honest.” Sitting up in the chair, I said, “But I take it you have some suggestions?”

“Two actually; I could come up to your room, or you could come to mine.” Looking hopeful, Tucker said, “What do you say?”

I wasn’t sure if it was the alcohol talking, or my new body affecting my mind, but I was considering taking him up on his offer. The more I thought about it, the more I started to wonder how Kelsey and the rest would react if they saw what I was doing. After thinking it over for a moment, I decided that I need more time to adjust before sleeping with someone. Turning to Tucker, I said, “No offense, Tucker; but I’ve had a rough day, I’d really just like to relax. But if you ask me again tomorrow, I’m sure I’ll be in a different frame of mind.”

I could tell Tucker was disappointed, but he took my rejection well enough, “Sure, I’ll ask you again tomorrow.”
11111111111111111111111311111111.title: At the Pool

111111111111111111111113111111111.content:
I stayed around the pool for a couple hours; splitting my time between reading and swimming in the pool. I quickly learned that my new body was a tad on the sensitive side; thankfully no one was around to hear my pleasurable moans.

I finally called it a day as the sun started to set. Gathering my things, I went back inside. I was about to turn towards the elevator when I decided to make a beeline for the concierge.

Approaching the desk, I saw a slightly older woman standing behind it. Looking up from her computer, she said, “Can I help you, ma’am?”

“Yes, you can.” Smiling, I said, “I heard rave reviews about this Italian restaurant in town. I was wondering if you’d be able to make me a reservation for tonight.”

“Of course, ma’am; it is short notice but I’ll see what I can do.”

After giving her my information, I thanked her and took the elevator upstairs to my room. Once I was inside, I threw everything on the couch and went into the bathroom to wash up.

***************


I didn’t spend very long in the shower; solely because I was weirded out by my sensitive skin. Which was weird, since I didn’t have a problem with that in the pool. Oh well, thinking to myself as I wrapped a a towel around my chest, guess it’ll take a while before I’m completely at ease with my new body.

Wearing nothing but the towel, I walked into the bedroom just as the phone started ringing. Picking up receiver, I said, “Hello?”

“Hello Ms. Anderson; this is Gretchen from the concierge desk. I was able to get you a reservation for 6:45 tonight.”

Looking at the clock, I saw that left me about 45 minutes to get ready. “Thank you Gretchen; could you have a driver waiting around 6:25?”

“Of course.”

After hanging up the phone, I started towards the closet to find an outfit. That was until the phone started ringing again - only this time it was my cellphone.

Looking at the display, I saw it was someone named Caitlin calling me. Her contact picture showed she was one of the girls Amelia hung out with. Well, thinking as I grabbed the phone, let’s hope she doesn’t realize I’m not Amelia.

Answering the call, I said, “Hey Caitlin, what’s up?”

“I just got off a call with Michael; he wanted to know if I’d heard from you.” Laughing, she said, “He kept acting like he had no idea you two were separated.”

The first thing that came to mind when I heard Caitlin speak was her voice – like a typical valley girl. Oh God, I have to associate myself with girls like her.

I pushed those thoughts to the back of my mind; focusing instead on her comments about Michael. “Yeah, he did the same thing with me; he actually implied that something was wrong with me.”

“Girl there’s something wrong with him; he cheats on you and then acts like nothing happened.”

“That’s why I went ahead on blocked him; the next time he tries to contact me, I’ll slap him with a restraining order.” Sighing, I said, “Let him move in with his floozy.”

The more I talked with Caitlin, the more I started to realize something. Having never met Michael, I was going solely by what Amelia had told me. That being said, I was surprised to see just how easy it was for me to feel anger towards him. I snapped out of my anger when I heard Caitlin say, "Whatever happens; you can always count on Stacy and me for support.”

“Thanks.” Looking at the clock, I said, “I’ve got to go, Caitlin; I have dinner reservations in a bit, and I still have to get ready.”

“No worries; I’ll talk to you tomorrow.”
111111111111111111111113111111111.title: Later On

1111111111111111111111131111111111.content:
All eyes were on me as I entered the restaurant, wearing a sensible yet form-fitting dress. The young girl at the counter took my name and escorted me through the restaurant to my table. I noticed both men and women staring at me as I took my seat; no doubt wondering why an attractive woman like me was by herself.

A waitress came by after a few minutes to take my drink order; feeling adventurous I decided to order a martini. I looked over the menu while I waited for the waitress to return with my drink. I’d been here a few times with Mom and Kelsey, so I was already familiar with what was on the menu.

Normally I would’ve ordered one of their steaks; but since I now had a figure to keep, I settled on something a little less fattening – eggplant parmesan. The waitress soon came back with my drink, after which she took my order and walked off.

I took a sip of my drink as I looked around the restaurant; suddenly noticing Amy sitting with her parents a few tables away. She looked like she was deep in conversation with her parents, and I had to resist the urge to say hi to her.

*************************


I’d been at the restaurant for an hour; and I was on third martini. My inhibitions decreased with each sip I took. There was a man sitting at the table next to me; the more I had to drink, the more I found myself sizing him up. The only thing stopping me was a nagging voice in the back of my head, telling me that something was wrong. I’ve only been a woman for 8 hours; I shouldn’t be thinking like this just yet.

Eventually I finished my meal; after paying, I stumbled outside and flagged down a taxi to take me back to the hotel. Once inside my room, I made my way into the bedroom. Collapsing on the bed, I said to myself, “I can’t let anyone know how much I drank tonight.”

I wasn’t feeling any pain as I somehow managed to get out of the dress and into a nightgown. Turning off the lights, I climbed into bed and was asleep within seconds.
1111111111111111111111131111111111.title: At The Restaurant

11111111111111111111111311111111111.content:
As expected, I woke up the next morning nursing a pretty nasty hangover. Going into the bathroom to splash cold water on my face, I said to myself, I guess I should learn what my limits are.

Once I was finished in the bathroom, I walked into the main room and sat down on the couch. It was still too early to contact my family, so I decided to learn a little more about my life.

Thankfully, Amelia had brought her laptop with her, so I turned it on and logged into her social media accounts. Her Instagram was a lot like I thought it would be; with pictures of her and her girlfriends at clubs wearing skimpy outfits.

There were a few photos of her and Michael; I knew they were from before the affair because they looked happy in them. Looking at Michael, I couldn’t help but find him attractive. I guess it made sense, since Amelia had been married to him for close to 8 years. Bastard, you had to ruin a good thing by screwing your secretary.

After spending the better part of the morning surfing my new social media accounts, I decided to get dressed and grab some lunch. Not in the mood for anything to showy, I settled on a pair of capris pants and a top. It’s only lunch, no reason to dress up.

The resort had a well-known on-site restaurant serving various styles of food. I could’ve gone here last night, but the Italian restaurant was nice.

After ordering a chicken salad, I decided to use the bathroom to freshen myself up a bit. That would prove to be a mistake on my part.

The moment I walked into the bathroom; I saw one of the girls from the pool glaring at me. Before I could even say anything, she got right in my face and said, “You better stay away from Tucker, bitch.” Looking me over, she said, “He’s mine; and I’m not letting some slut with a boob job take him from me.”

I had been prepared to ignore her childish behavior until she mentioned my boobs. “Girl, my boobs cost more than that horrible monstrosity you call a dye job.” Letting my angry flow, I said, “And if Tucker wants to hit on me, he’s more than welcome. I guarantee I’ll show him what a woman can do.”

It looked as though the girl was about to speak; until she huffed and stormed out of the room. The moment she was gone, I grabbed hold of the counter and took a breath. I don’t know what had come over me, I hadn’t intended to lash out at the girl that way. “The minute I contact my family, I need to ask Amelia if she’s experienced anything like this.”
11111111111111111111111311111111111.title: Something May Be Very Wrong Here

111111111111111111111113111111111111.content:
Heading back up to my room, I grabbed my cellphone and started dialing. It wasn’t long before I heard Kelsey’s voice on the other end, “Hello?”

I was speechless; I had no idea how what to say. Of course they knew that I’d be calling, I just had no idea how I was going to tell them who I was. After giving it some thought, I said, “Hel Kel, it’s me.”

I hoped that was enough to prove who I was; I was the only one who ever called Kelsey that. Sure enough, it worked, “Kevin? You’re a woman?”

“Yeah, I’m a woman now; my name’s Amelia Anderson.” Confused, I said, “I would have thought my replacement would’ve come clean about that.”

“They’ve actually been pretty quiet; I think he’s still trying to process everything.” Changing the subject, Kelsey said, “So tell me everything; what do you look like?”

I proceed to explain, in excruciating detail, everything about my new body; including the backpain from my breasts. When I was finished, I said, “All in all, I think I’ve done a pretty good job coping.” Sitting on the couch, I said, “There have been a few issues, but they’re nothing I can’t handle.”

Concern clear in her voice, Kelsey said, “What kind of issues?”

“I had a few too many drinks at dinner last night; towards the end I found myself lusting after a man at the table next to me.” Taking a breath, I said, “Do you know if Kevin’s experienced anything like that?”

“Not that I’m aware of; but you should probably ask him that.”

“That’s actually why I called; I was wondering if I could come by tonight.”

“I don’t see why not; although you wouldn’t be able to stay very long.” Pausing, Kelsey said, “Mom’s getting together with Leslie and Ms. Harrison for a girl’s night.”

After what happened yesterday, I reluctant to be near Leslie again. But that didn’t stop me from saying, “I don’t think they’d mind having a fourth person join them; after all, I’m a woman myself now.”

“Well, if you really think you’re up to it; they’re all meeting here around 6:30. Why don’t you come over around 6? I’ll tell Mom you’re coming.”

“Sounds good, I’ll see you then.” Smiling, I said, “Now I just have to find something to wear.”
111111111111111111111113111111111111.title: Contacting My Family

1111111111111111111111131111111111111.content:
I spent quite some time searching through my closet for the perfect outfit to wear. I used to tease Kelsey about doing this exact same thing; now I was doing the exact same thing. As I continued to look through the closet, I wondered if I was adjusting to womanhood quicker because I didn’t have a father in my life.

I shrugged that thought to side as I found the perfect outfit; a short skirt with a matching top that barely covered my midriff. Perfect, I thought, guys will be all over me tonight.

Once I was dressed and my makeup was finished, I called down to the concierge to get a ride to my house. I was feeling nervous the entire ride over; Kelsey seemed cool over the phone but seeing someone in person was different. My level of nervousness decreased once I got to the house; after tipping the driver, I got out and walked up the driveway.

I was about to knock on the door when I heard a car pulling into the driveway. Thinking it was Ms. Harrison, I turned around – only to see that it was Leslie. I could tell that she recognized me by the look of disgust on her face. I stood on the porch as she got out of her car, “What the hell are you doing here?”

I couldn’t think of a good excuse, so I decided to wing it, “I’m a friend of Colleen Harrison’s from college; she knew I was in town, so she invited me to come along on girl’s night.”

Approaching me, Leslie said, “Now I know you’re lying; I only just met Colleen a few weeks ago, but I doubt she’d be friends with someone like you.”

I don’t know what came over me, but suddenly I was angrier than I’d ever been. “What’s your problem with me?” Getting right in Leslie’s face, I said, “Do you hate women like me because someone stole your husband away from you?”

Leslie was stunned; just standing there with her mouth open. I thought she was going to say something, until she reached out and started yanking on my hair. Things would have devolved into a cat fight had Mom not interrupted us. “What the hell is going on here?”

Leslie and I separated, our hair and makeup now a complete mess. Looking at Mom, I said, “Sorry about that; just a little tension that boiled over.”

As Mom stepped out of the house, I could see Kelsey and Amelia standing just inside. The look on Kelsey’s face told me she knew who I was, while Amelia just stared at me. Walking over to us, Mom looked me over and said, “I don’t even know you; what are you doing here?”

Kelsey stepped forward before I could say anything, “Mom, that’s Kevin...the real Kevin.”
1111111111111111111111131111111111111.title: Arriving at the House

11111111111111111111111311111111111111.content:
Amelia stepped out onto the porch as Leslie stared at me; with Mom and Kelsey talking a few feet away. Leslie stared at me as she approached Kelsey, “What are you talking about, Kelsey?” gesturing to Amelia, on the porch, she said, “Kevin’s standing right there on the porch.”

Mom, having been brought up to speed by Kelsey, said, “As a matter of fact, that’s not Kevin.” Approaching me, placing a tender hand on my waist, Mom said, “As weird as it sounds, this is Kevin.”

Leslie turned to me, shaking her head in disbelief. After a couple seconds, she said, “Someone really needs to tell me what’s going on here.”

Casting a quick glance at Mom, I said, “We’ll tell you everything; but I’d prefer they we don’t do it in public.”

Once everyone was inside, I was about to join the others in the family room when Amelia pulled me into the bathroom across the hall. I came close to rolling my ankle in the heels I was wearing, but I managed to keep that from happening.

The bathroom we were in was hardly big enough for the two of us; so, Amelia was pressed up against me. “Damn this body!” stepping as far away as he could, Amelia said, “I can’t do anything without getting an erection.”

I took a quick glance downward to see the unmistakable tenting of his shorts that could only mean one thing. Blushing slightly, I turned away and said, “Try thinking of something unappealing; that usually worked for me.”

After a moment of silence, Amelia said, “Thanks, that helped.”

“You’re welcome.” Sighing, I said, “This seems as good a time as any; have you noticed anything unusual happening since the swap?”

“You mean apart from the unwanted erections?” leaning against the sink, he said, “Now that you mention it; I did have some strange dreams last night. I started out as my old self, only to end up turning into you.”

“Huh, nothing like that’s happened to me.” Taking a breath, I said, “I did find myself especially interested in a few guys that I encountered yesterday.”

Raising an eyebrow, Amelia said, “Interested how?”

Starting to blush, I said, “Let’s put it this way; after a few drinks at dinner, I was about ready to pounce on this guy at the restaurant. He was that cute.”

“Wow.” Shocked, Amelia said, “I guess they weren’t kidding when they said this would be a learning experience.”

“You’re telling me; 24 hours in a woman’s body and I’m ready to sleep with a guy.”

I couldn’t help but notice the devious look on Amelia’s face; but chose not to mention it. Looking at me, he said, “Are you sure you’re up to this tonight? I heard your...I mean my mom talking with that woman you were fighting. They’re looking to get good and drunk. I can say from experience that makes woman easy targets to sleazebags.”

“Relax; I’m sure they won’t let me get into too much trouble.” Hearing some commotion outside the room, I said, “We should probably get out there; I hear Ms. Harrison arriving.”

Looking at me as I turned to open the door, Amelia said, “It’ll make things easier on all of us if you call me Kevin; and I’ll call you Amelia.”

“Ah, I don’t think so.” With a grin, I said, “You can call me Ms. Anderson.”

Rolling his eyes, Kevin said, “Fine, whatever you say.”

The two of us stepped out of the bathroom just as Mom was letting Ms. Harrison inside. Taking one look at me, Ms. Harrison said, “Who’s this?”

Approaching her, I said, “You knew me as Kevin.”

“Kevin?” Ms. Harrison was floored; looking me up and down, she said, “Wow, you look even hotter than I do. I should definitely keep you away from Mason.”

Standing in the doorway to the family room, Leslie cleared her throat and said, “Would someone please tell me what the hell is going on here?”
11111111111111111111111311111111111111.title: Continue

111111111111111111111113111111111111111.content:
Everyone took seats in the family room, as Leslie focused all her attention on myself and Ms. Harrison. To be honest it was making me uncomfortable, and I could only assume the same could be said for Ms. Harrison. After a few minutes of silent staring, I said, “So Leslie, I’m sure you’ve got plenty of questions for us.”

“You’re damn right I do!” incredulous, Leslie said, “How can you claim to be Kevin when he’s sitting right over there?”

“You’ll want to prepare yourself; this is going to take a while.” Taking a deep breath, I said, “Have you ever heard of a company called Radeon Scientific?”

Shaking her head, Leslie said, “The name sounds vaguely familiar, but I have no idea what they do.”

“They run these very elaborate multi-year studies; that involve placing participants into unusual situations.” Gesturing to Ms. Harrison and myself, I said, “I swapped lives with a socialite from Los Angeles, while Ms. Harrison went from being a pudgy teenage boy to the lovely woman sitting next to me.”

I could tell that Leslie was still struggling to understand what I’d said, “How can they possibly have the ability to do something like this?”

“I’m not exactly sure how it all works.” Pausing, I said, “All I know for sure is that I’m in this body, and the woman that I now look like is in mine.”

“How long have you been this way?” looking at me, Leslie said, “Was that you I met a few days ago, or someone else?”

Shaking my head, I said, “No; that was me. I’ve only been this way since yesterday.” Looking at her, unsure how to say this next part, I said, “Do you remember our encounter yesterday in the ladies room?”

“That was you!?” her eyes going wide, Leslie said, “When you said I didn’t know who you were...”

“I wasn’t being vague; you couldn’t have known it was me you were yelling at.”

While Mom and Ms. Harrison looked on, unsure what was happening, Leslie got up and hugged me, “Good lord. I’m sorry, Kevin...er, Amelia.”

Returning to the hug, I said, “It’s okay, Leslie; it’s not like you expected something like this to happen.” Glancing at Ms. Harrison, I said, “Isn’t that right, Ms. Harrison?”

“Now you know how I felt when you found out.” Looking at me from the couch, Ms. Harrison said, “Also, you can call me Colleen; you’re not one of my students anymore and we’re both practically the same age.”

Smiling as I broke with Leslie, I said, “Sure thing, Colleen.” Turning my attention to Mom, I said, “Does that mean I get to call you Abby?”

“I suppose it’s only fair.” Getting up from her chair, Mom said, “Although it just dawned on me that I’m about to have a girl’s night with two women who used to be teenage boys.”

Standing up next to me, Colleen said, “That shouldn’t be a problem, Abby; or have you forgotten that I’ve got a boyfriend.”

Raising my hand to show the tan line on my ring finger, I said, “Technically I’m still married; even if my husband cheated on me.”

I caught a fleeting glimpse of a smile on Kevin’s face after mentioning my separation. Before I could even question him, Kelsey nudged him and said, “Come on Kev, let’s give the adults some space.”

After Kevin and Kelsey left the room, it was clear that Abby wasn’t fully understanding what Colleen and I were saying. Having gotten the hint, Leslie stood up next to her and said, “Abby, these young women are trying to say that they’re not teenage boys anymore.”

Abby silently glanced at Leslie for a moment before turning her attention to me and Colleen, “I suppose you’re right; I shouldn’t think of you two as those precocious young boys who used to chase each other around the yard with squirt guns.” Pausing, she said, “That being said, what do you say we get this evening started? I don’t know about you three, but I could certainly go for a drink.”
111111111111111111111113111111111111111.title: Coming Clean to Leslie

1111111111111111111111131111111111111111.content:
All four of us piled into Colleen’s car for the drive downtown; Leslie and Abby sat in the back while I sat up front with Colleen.
Driving down the road, Colleen looked at me and said, “What’s on your mind, Amelia?”

“Suddenly I’m not sure this is a smartidea; I don’t think I’m ready for girl’s night.” Turning away from the window, I said, “Everyone in this car, even you, has been a woman longer than me.”

While Abby and Leslie carried on their own conversation, Colleen looked at me and said, “Just take it one step at a time and you’ll be fine.” Smiling as she drove onto the main road, Colleen continued, “At least this won’t be your first introduction to alcohol.”

For a moment I thought she was referring to what happened the night before; until I realized I hadn’t told her about that. Scouring my mind, I eventually remembered a time in Middle School where Skyler, Amy, Brian, and I helped ourselves to some beers at a Fourth of July party. “We got in so much trouble for that; I’m surprised our parents ever let us hang out again.” Chuckling, I said, “At least this time we’re both old enough that we can legally drink.”

With a devious grin on her face, Colleen said, “Plus if we play our cards right, we won’t have to pay for any drinks tonight.”

Once again it took me a moment to realize what Colleen was getting at. Once it finally occurred to me, I said, “You can’t be serious; you have a boyfriend!”

“Oh please; it’s just a little harmless flirting.” Grinning, Colleen said, “I’m well aware that I have a boyfriend; Mason’s the only one I’ll be sleeping with tonight.”

Suddenly I couldn’t stop thinking about the notion of sleeping with someone tonight. While Leslie and Abby continued to be oblivious to our conversation, I said, “Would you think any less of me if I told you I wanted to sleep with someone tonight?”

“You’re a grown woman, Amelia; it doesn’t matter what I think.” Looking at me, Colleen said, “If you want to sleep with someone, you go right ahead and sleep with someone.”

“I appreciate the support; but that’s not exactly what I meant.” Starting to blush, I said, “I always thought my first time would be with a girl, not as one.”

This time it was Colleen’s turned to be perplexed. After a moment, she finally realized what I was getting at. “Oh right, that totally slipped my mind.” With a reassuring smile, Colleen said, “I certainly won’t judge you; and I’m sure Abby and Leslie won’t either. Do you remember what I told you in the driveway last week?”

Remembering that conversation vividly, I said, “You told me how it was the most amazing experience in the world.”

“Do you think I wasn’t nervous the first time Mason and I slept together? Because I was.” Continuing to smile, Colleen said, “Whenever it finally happens for you, I promise it’s going to feel perfectly natural.”

As we continued down the road, I turned to Colleen and said, “There’s something I’ve been meaning to ask you, Colleen.” Taking a breath, I continued, “What would you say to your younger self if given the chance?”

It was clear from the look on her face that Colleen had recently given that some thought. Taking a deep breath, she said, “If I were ever given a chance to see Skyler again, I’d tell him to get back in shape. He was a pretty handsome kid before he put on the weight; if he lost it again, girls would be all over him.” Smiling, she said, “If I were 10 years younger, I’d be the first in line to date him.”

I was smiling on the outside, but deep down I was confused: it was as if Colleen was referring to Skyler as a separate person from her. Before I could question her further, Colleen turned into the parking lot of our destination – Eclectic.
1111111111111111111111131111111111111111.title: Driving to the Club

1111111111111111111111131111111111111111.content:
Just about two hours had passed since our arrival; and it was safe to say that everyone was having an enjoyable time. Colleen and I were talking to each other in one of booths, while Abby and Leslie were dancing together on the dance floor.

I took a sip of my drink as Colleen and I watched the others dancing. Leaning closer so she could hear, I said, “I don’t think I’ve ever seen her this happy before.”

“You’ve never been in a situation where you’ve seen who she really is.” Scooching closer, Colleen said, “Before Radeon, you always saw her as your mother. Now you’re starting to realize that there’s another aspect to her as well – she’s a woman who had needs and feelings.”

Raising an eyebrow, I looked at Colleen and said, “Was it like that for you; the first time your Mom met Colleen?”

“Yes, in a way; but my introduction to who my Mom really was didn’t happen at a nightclub.” Sipping her drink, Colleen said, “My entire life I think I’d only ever seen her dress up for weddings and the like; I thought she was the type who didn’t show her feminine side. So, imagine my shock when she took me shopping and suggested I buy all these feminine outfits.”

Looking at Colleen, I said, “Part of me thinks that’s because she never had a daughter until that point.”

“You may be onto something there.” Getting up from the booth, Colleen said, “Come on, I need to use the restroom.”
“Okay.” Not getting the hint, I said, “I’ll wait here till you get back.”

“No; you’re coming with me.” Grabbing my arm, Colleen said, “Women always use the restroom together; especially in places like this.”

I was a little worried about losing our booth; but that subsided when I saw Leslie and Abby making their way back. After telling them where we were going, I followed Colleen through the crowd to the lady’s room.

******************************


We had to wait in line to use the facilities; but once we were both finished, Colleen and I met up at the sink. Looking at me as she touched up her makeup, Colleen said, “I can’t help but notice that you’re not doing a lot of flirting.” Pausing to do her lipstick, Colleen said, “You’re not looking for someone to spend the rest of your life with; just find someone to spend the night with.”

“I don’t know; I mean I’ve only been a woman for little more than a day.” Sighing, I said, “I’m not sure I’m ready to flirt with a guy just yet.”

“From what you’ve told me, it doesn’t sound like you had that problem last night.” Looking at me, Colleen said, “Perhaps we need to get you another drink to lower your inhibitions.”

I wanted to protest as Colleen pulled me towards the door. But, as luck would have it, I was soon saved when I bumped into someone leaving the men’s room. Turning around, I was about to apologize when I saw who I’d bumped into. “Tucker?”
1111111111111111111111131111111111111111.title: The Night Club, Part 1

1111111111111111111111131111111111111111.content:
Tucker was standing a foot away from me, looking as handsome as ever. He seemed to have a problem recognizing me in the dim lighting – but after a few seconds he realized who’d bumped into him. “Amelia?” looking me up and down, he said, “Wow; you look even hotter than when you were in that bathing suit.”

That remark elicited a chuckle from Colleen, which in turn elicited a glare from me. Gesturing to her, I said, “Don’t mind her; she’s had a couple drinks.”

Forcefully nudging me with her elbow, Colleen reached out with her hand and said, “My name’s Colleen; Amelia and I went to college together.”

“It’s nice to meet you, Colleen.” Turning back to me, Tucker said, “I thought I saw you earlier with two other women.”

Realizing he was talking about Leslie and Abby, I said, “Those are some friends of Colleen’s.” looking around the bar area, I said,
“I don’t see any of your buddies from yesterday.”

“They were here; but they found dates for the evening and left me high and dry.” Trying to be friendly, Tucker said, “I hope I’m not being too forward; but could I join you ladies for a while?”

“Sure, why not.”

As the three of us headed back towards the booth, Colleen whispered in my ear, “Girl, I can tell he likes you.” Smiling, she said, “If you don’t leave with him, I will; Mason be damned.”

For a fleeting moment I thought back to my conversation with Tucker at the pool. Leaning next to Colleen, I said, “He is kind of cute; I was flirting with him at the pool yesterday.”

Colleen and I stopped talking after that as we continued walking. The three of us approached the booth to find Abby and Leslie making out with each other. The part of my brain that was still male found that arousing until I remembered one of the women was my mom. Clearing her throat, Colleen said, “I hope we’re not interrupting anything.”

Quickly separating from Leslie, Abby blushed and said, “Sorry; we were caught in the moment.” Spotting Tucker standing next to me, she said, “Who’s this?”

“This is Tucker; we met at the hotel pool yesterday.” Gesturing to the others, I said, “Tucker; this is Abby and her girlfriend Leslie.”

Once the introductions had been made, we all sat down. I couldn’t help but notice the way Abby was staring at Tucker; almost as if she were sizing him up. “So, Tucker; why don’t you tell us about yourself?”

“There’s really not a lot to tell; I graduated from Rutgers in May with a degree in engineering.” Smiling, he said, “I’m taking a semester off before going back for my Masters.”

Raising an eyebrow, Abby said, “Forgive me for asking; but why aren’t you interested in girls your age?” leaning forward, she said, “Don’t get me wrong; Amelia’s a lovely woman, but surely you’d rather be with someone your own age?”

Glaring at Abby, I said, “I know you’re not implying I’m old, Abby; I’m only 29.” Trying to remain calm, I said, “Besides, who said anything about me starting a relationship with Tucker?”

“Perhaps we should ask your husband, Amelia; separated or not, how do you think he’d feel knowing you were hooking up with someone barely out of college?”

Before I could say anything, Tucker spoke up and, “If it helps, I’m not looking for a long-term relationship here.” Pausing, he said, “I’m just looking to have some fun on my vacation.”

Abby looked as though she was about to say something; but I cut her off. Getting to my feet, I looked at her and said, “Can I talk to you in private, Abby?”

Emotions were high as Abby and I walked into the alley behind the bar. Turning to her, I said, “What the hell are you doing, Mom?”

“I’m trying to prevent a grown man from taking advantage of my 15-year-old son.” Looking at me, she said, “What I want to know is what the hell you’re doing? You haven’t even been a woman for a day; and you’re already hooking up with a guy.”

I was about to speak when some employee came out to empty the trash. If he was at all confused why two women were standing in the alley, he didn’t say anything. After waiting for him to leave, I said, “Look Abby, for the next two years I’m not your son – I’m a grown woman.” Sighing, I said, “Can you honestly tell me that, if you every found yourself in a man’s body, you wouldn’t be the least bit curious?”

“You’re right; I have to get used to the fact that you’re no longer my son. I have no authority to tell you what you can or can’t do.” Looking at me, Abby said, “But answer me this: Tucker seems like a nice guy, but he’s still in college. What kind of life could you honestly make with him?”

“Neither of us is looking for something long-term, Abby.” Crossing my arms, I said, “I’m not looking for Mr. Right; just Mr. Right Now.”

After that, the two of us started to walk back inside; only for Abby to grab my arm. “One last thing: please use protection tonight.” Looking at me, she said, “I don’t think you want to spend the next two years as a single mother.”

I nodded in acknowledgment as the two of us continued back inside. Walking through the bar, I was surprised when I didn’t see the others at our booth. Abby and I looked around, only to find them standing over by the door – and Colleen looked upset.
Walking over to them, I saw that Colleen’s outfit was soaked. “What happened?”

“Some guy thought I was flirting with him; he didn’t like it when I turned him down.” Gesturing to Tucker, Colleen said, “Tucker tried to get him to leave; but not before he threw his drink in my face.”

After thanking Tucker, I turned back to Colleen and said, “You going to be okay?”

“Yeah, I’ll be fine; pretty sure I can still save this outfit.” Sighing, Colleen said, “Probably for the best anyway; after all it’s a school night.”

Chuckling, I said, “You’re right, it wouldn’t do you any good to go to work hungover.”

As the five of us left the nightclub and started walking down the street, Colleen said, “I’m going to drop off Leslie and Abby; do you guys need a lift?”

Tucker shook his head as I looked at him. Turning back to Colleen, I said, “We’re only a couple blocks from the hotel; I’m sure we’ll be fine.”

“Okay then, I’ll talk to you tomorrow.” Turning her attention to Tucker, Colleen said, “It was nice meeting you, Tucker.”

“Likewise.” Smiling, he said, “I’m sorry about what happened.”
1111111111111111111111131111111111111111.title: The Night Club, Part 2

1111111111111111111111131111111111111111.content:
Tucker and I took our time walking back to the hotel; if only because my feet were killing me. After stopping at a crosswalk, I turned to Tucker and said, “Here’s some advice for you, Tucker. If you ever have the opportunity to wear heels, don’t do it.”

Chuckling, Tucker said, “Thanks for the advice.” Grinning, he said, “We’re only a block from the hotel, I can hold your shoes if you want to go barefoot.”

I didn’t need to hear that twice; I reached down and took off my heels. Handing them to Tucker, I said, “Thanks.”

We continued our walk to the hotel, entering the lobby a few minutes later. I got a few stares from people in the lobby. It didn’t take a genius to figure out why they were staring – I was stumbling from a few drinks and my outfit was a tad revealing. It didn’t help that I was obviously older then Tucker.

Tucker and I ignored the looks as we continued to the elevator. Stopping outside the door to my room, Tucker looked at me and said, “So I guess this is where we part ways?”

Shaking my head, I said, “I made a promise; and I’m a woman who keeps her promises.”

A smile formed on Tucker’s face as I leaned forward and kissed him on the lips. He started reciprocating the kiss as I fumbled with my keys.

We wasted no time stripping off our clothes once we got inside. Leaving a trail in our wake, the two of us started towards the bedroom.

It was only as the two of us climbed into bed that I started to hesitate. Only about 30 hours had passed since my introduction to womanhood – and here I was about to have an intimate encounter with a man.

I couldn’t help but wonder what was compelling me to do this – my innate curiosity or some part of Amelia’s personality that was taking hold.

Before I could consider this further, Tucker interrupted me by tenderly kissing my left breast. I let out a moan of pleasure, unlike any sound I’d ever made before, as Tucker continued kissing my body. He knows what he’s doing.

We kissed for a few more minutes before moving to the next logical step. I couldn’t help but feel nervous about what was happening – until I remembered what Colleen had told me. I’m a heterosexual woman, there’s nothing wrong with having sex with a man.

I let my body do all the work as Tucker and I continued to make passionate love to each other.
1111111111111111111111131111111111111111.title: Back at the Hotel

1111111111111111111111131111111111111111.content:
I felt myself slowly regaining consciousness the next morning, with my first thoughts focusing on the events of last night. My memory was a little fuzzy, probably from the drinks I’d had, but I vaguely remembered having a passionate experience with
Tucker. I was certain that Abby and Colleen were going to ask how it went; although I was certain I’d have to tone down some of the details. No need to tell them about the noises I made.

Opening my eyes, I turned to my right to find that Tucker was no longer in bed with me. I found myself briefly thinking he’d left, until I noticed his underwear on the floor nearby. Before I could call out for him, he entered the room carrying a tray of food in his arms. Placing the tray in front of me as he climbed back into, Tucker said, “I thought you might be hungry, so I ordered us some breakfast. Don’t worry, I had them charge it to my room.”

Grabbing a strawberry from the tray, I took a bite and said, “You’re really sweet, Tucker.” With a smile, I continued, “If I weren’t still technically married, and if you weren’t still going to school, I might have considered something more long term.”

“I know it’s none of my business; but why did you and your husband separate?”

I looked straight ahead for a few moments as I collected my thoughts. I didn’t know the whole story behind the separation, only what Kevin had told me in our meeting. Taking a deep breath, I said, “I found out that Michael, my husband, was having an affair with his secretary.” Sighing, I said, “I’m not positive, but I’m pretty sure it was resulted in her getting pregnant.”

I could see Tucker getting angry, “Anyone who cheats on their wife isn’t much of a man.” Looking at me, he said, “For what it’s worth, I’m truly sorry you had to deal with that.”

“There’s no need to apologize; I’ve already decided that I’m going to file for divorce when I get back to LA.” Taking his hand in mine, I said, “But, I would like to thank you for last night. That was the best sex I think I’ve ever had.”

Okay, so that last part was a lie. But I wasn’t exactly keen on the idea of telling Tucker the truth. With a smile on his face, Tucker said, “You’re welcome; I’m glad I could be of service.”

After that, the two of us lay in bed eating breakfast as we watched the morning news. Once the food was all gone, I turned to Tucker and said, “Any chance you’d want to spend the day together?”

“I’d love to, but I’m afraid I have to get going.” Sighing, Tucker said, “My friends and I are supposed to check out this morning.”

“That’s disappointing; but I knew going in that this was just going to be a one-night thing.” Leaning over to kiss him, I said, “I wish you all the best in life, Tucker.”

“You too, Amelia.” Smiling, Tucker said, “I hope you find someone who treats you the way you deserve.”

Wrapping myself in a bathrobe, I followed Tucker to the door. We said our goodbyes after exchanging one last kiss. I watched as he walked down the hall to the elevator; once he was gone, I closed the door and leaned up against it. God, I thought, I wonder how Amy and Brian would react if they knew what I did last night.
1111111111111111111111131111111111111111.title: Waking up the next morning

111111111111111111112.content:
I had prepared myself for this eventuality, but I was still surprised when I heard Mr. Cummings say they weren’t going to take me. Struggling to keep my calm, I said, “Why aren’t you going to let me be in one of your studies?”

“It’s nothing against you, I assure you; we simply don’t have any studies currently in the works that would require someone like you.” Sighing, Mr. Cummings continued, “To put you into a duplicate of an existing study would be a waste of money.”

“What do you mean?”

Looking as though he was getting annoyed, Mr. Cummings said, “Let’s say, for example, we turned you into an adult woman.”
Taking a deep breath, he said, “What would we learn from your situation that we wouldn’t have already learned from your friend Skyler?”

While Mom and Kelsey stood up from the table, I remained seated and looked at Mr. Cummings, “I can think of a few things; like what I was a lesbian, or someone who was skittish about dating. My point is, you don’t know until you try.”

“That’s just it, Mr. Scott, we’re not going to try.” Getting up from the table, Mr. Cummings said, “It varies from study to study; but the initial preparation and procedures can be expensive.”

I was about to say something else when Mom grabbed my shoulder, “Come on sweetie; I think we’ve taken up enough of Mr. Cummings’ time.” Looking at Elena and Mr. Cummings, Mom said, “I appreciate having the chance to meet with you.”

Elena walked us down to the main lobby. Just as we were walking out the door, she said, “I’m sorry you came out here for nothing; rest assured we’ll keep you in mind for future studies.”

After saying our goodbyes, we all climbed into the car and left the parking lot. I took one last look at Radeon as we drove away, certain that they made a mistake. Seeing that it was just before noon, I was about to suggest we go for lunch when suddenly a truck came out of nowhere and sideswiped us.
111111111111111111112.title: We Can't Take You

1111111111111111111121.content:
I felt holding my hand as I slowly regained consciousness. The only problem was, it felt much bigger than mine. “Mom?” Did my voice sound higher?

“Kevin! I’m right here, sweetie.” With a firm tone, Mom said, “Don’t try to move; and don’t look around.”

My eyes still closed, I felt Mom touching my face. At least I assumed it was her; her hands felt too big. Opening my eyes, I saw her looking at me with worry in her eyes. "What happened?" I asked. "I-I think I thaw a truck... "

"There was an accident, sweetie; but Radeon was able to save you.” Grasping my hand in hers, Mom said, “I want to you know that I love you no matter what, sweetie.”

A million thoughts went through my mind: why did she keep calling me sweetie? Why was she so big? Looking at her, on the verge of panic, I said, “What did they do? How'd they thave me? What'th with the way I'm talking?"

"You…you were pretty banged up in the crash, Kevin. The only way Radeon could save you was to put you into the Identity program.”

I remembered the Identity program; it was the one Skylar was in, where they changed everything about you. “What did they do to me?”

Mom reached into her purse and handed me something. I looked and saw a picture of a little girl; probably no older than 5 years old, with strawberry-blonde curls and blue-green eyes. It looked like she was missing a couple baby teeth in the front.

I turned to Mom, to ask her why she was showing me this, when I noticed something out of the corner of my eye. Did the picture..move?

I looked again. The girl in the picture now looked puzzled by something. As puzzled as I felt.

I opened my mouth. She opened hers.

That was when I realized: Mom hadn’t given me a picture, she’d given me a mirror. I turned to Mom. " M-Mommy?"

She nodded. "You are now a five-year-old girl."
1111111111111111111121.title: Waking Up

11111111111111111111211.content:
All things considered I think I handled myself pretty well. I’m sure others would have freaked out at seeing themselves turned into a little girl, but I just stared at the mirror in silence.

Holding me close, Mom waited a few minutes before saying something. “Kevin, sweetie, please say something.”

Turning to look at Mom, it was like someone had flipped a switch in my head. “How could you let them do thith to me?”

“I didn’t have a choice, Kevin; I wasn’t going to let you die.” Looking down at me, she said, “Being a little girl for two years is a small price to pay for keeping you alive.”

“Thath easy for you to thay.” Groaning, I said, “You don’t have talk with a thith thupid lisp.”

“That’ll go away once your big girl tooth comes in.”

Now angrier the I’d ever been, I looked at Mom, “I can’t believe thith; you’re already treating me like a little girl.”

“Well I’m sorry; I’ve had two weeks to come to terms with this.”

“What!?”
11111111111111111111211.title: Reactions

111111111111111111112111.content:
I was on the verge of tears by this point; and I’m sure no one would blame me at all. This whole time I thought it’d only been a few hours since the accident when two weeks had passed. Looking at Mom, I said, “When were you going to tell me?”

“I was going to tell you once you had a chance to process everything else.” Looking at me, Mom said, “The doctors were concerned that you’d respond negatively to waking up this way.”

“Of course, I’d respond negatively: I’m 5 years old!” taking a deep breath, I said, “How would you feel if thith happened to you?”

“Probably the same way you’re feeling right now.” Taking a breath, Mom said, “Look sweetie...Kevin, it’s going to take some time, but you’ll learn to accept this.”

The floodgates were open, I was having a full-blown tantrum. “I don’t want to learn to accept it!” tears flowing down my face, I said, “I want to be a big boy again!”

Growing annoyed by my behavior, Mom said, “Listen to me, young lady; you wouldn’t survive if the doctors put you back into your real body.”

Being called young lady only served to make things worse: I was hysterical; crying and flaying my arms in every direction. I heard what she said, but I was in no condition to process it. Eventually, after a few minutes of this, a nurse came running into the room. I felt a jab in my arm and suddenly I started feeling drowsy.
111111111111111111112111.title: Kevin's First Tantrum

1111111111111111111121111.content:
It seemed Kelsey had arrived in the room while I was unconscious; because I could hear her talking with Mom as I woke up. “I really hoped Kevin would take the news better.”

“It’s not your sister’s fault, Kelsey; I’m sure you’d react the same if you were in her position.” Sighing, Mom said, “What matters now is that we help your sister in whatever way we can.”

Opening my eyes, I saw Mom and Kelsey standing at the foot of my bed. “If you really want to help me, you can thtart by not referring to me like a girl.” Looking at them both, I said, “I may look like a girl; but I’m thtill a big boy where it counth. And I’m definitely not anyone’s thithter.”

Kelsey struggled to stifle a laugh, which led to a glaring look from me. In response, she said, “I’m sorry; but you just referred to yourself as a ‘big boy.’”

Still glaring at her, I said, “Thut up Kelthy.”

While I groaned at the return of that annoying lisp, Mom looked at me and said, “Sweetie, that’s not appropriate language for a little girl.”

“What did I just thay, Mommy? I’m not really a little girl!”

“We’ll agree to disagree, sweetie.” Reaching over to tousle my hair, Mom said, “The doctors came in while you were asleep. I thought you’d want to hear what they had to say, so I asked them to come back.”
1111111111111111111121111.title: Waking Up

11111111111111111111211111.content:
Mom went to get the doctors, leaving me alone in the room with Kelsey. I was perfectly fine sitting on the bed alone, until Kelsey joined me and placed me on her lap. I couldn’t help but squirm; feeling no small amount of discomfort from the fact that I was now small enough to sit in my twin sister’s lap.

Glancing at her as she fiddled with my hair, I said, “You’re enjoying thith, aren’t you?”

“You mean the fact that my macho twin brother is suddenly an adorable little girl? Yes, I’m enjoying this very much.” Looking at
me, she said, “Just think about all the times you used to tease me growing up.”

My face turned pale, remembering how I used to mercilessly tease Kelsey when we were kids. Looking at her, I said, “You’re not going to teath me, are you?”

“Maybe for a couple days; but not forever.” Smiling, Kelsey said, “Once I get it out of my system, I’ll do everything I can to help you learn to be a little girl.”

As if on cue, I suddenly felt a familiar feeling in my abdomen. “Do you think can thart helping me now? I have to go potty.”
Kelsey stared at me for a moment until she realized what I was getting at. “Oh!” placing me on the bed as she hopped off, she said, “Come on, let’s get you on the toilet.”

Sitting on the toilet, I couldn’t help but think back to how this all started. The chain of events that led to me being turned into a little girl started with Kelsey and me in the bathroom. Kelsey sat me down on the toilet and told me what I had to do. Nothing happened for a few minutes, until just before I felt I was going to burst – then everything started flowing.

Once I was finished, I carefully wiped myself as I looked at Kelsey, “Thankth, Kelthy.”

“No problem, sis.” Picking me up in her arms, Kelsey said, “That’s what sisters do.”

Mom came back into the room just as we left the bathroom, no doubt realizing what had just happened. Looking at us, she said, “The doctors have set up the conference room down the hall. They’re waiting for us.”
11111111111111111111211111.title: Mom Leaves Me Alone With Kelsey

111111111111111111112111111.content:
Mom, Kelsey, and I went to the conference room. Three doctors were waiting for us at the table. As we walked to the other side of the table, I saw that one chair had a booster seat. No prizes for guessing who sat down there.

"Welcome," said one of the doctors. "I'm Dr. Newman. These are my colleagues, Dr. Ripple and Dr. Totten. I'm glad to see you up and about, Kevin."

"Thankth," I replied. "Now, why am I a little girl with a lithp?"

"It was all we could do," Dr. Ripple answered. "The Sophie identity was all we had available. Considering your injuries, we felt that time was of the essence. Did your mother tell you how badly you were injured?"

"I didn't go into detail," Mom said. "I was afraid of the nightmares."

I wasn't sure if she meant her nightmares, or mine.

"Well, I can tell you that none of your friends would have recognized you," Dr. Totten said. "And going to the bathroom for you would have involved either a catheter or one of your relatives putting on an elbow-length rubber glove. We believed you would prefer your current state to that, and your mother agreed."

Well, that put things in a different light. "Tho what happenth now? How long do I have to be like thith?"

"Two years," Dr. Newman said. "After that, we will restore you to your healthy former self, and you will be paid $100,000."

"I would like to examine you," Dr. Ripple said. "If everything checks out, you will be discharged immediately."
111111111111111111112111111.title: Meeting with the Doctors

1111111111111111111121111111.content:
After talking for a few more minutes, Doctor Condon led us down the hall to an examination room. Looking at me as Kelsey placed me on the table, he said, “Okay Sophie, now I’m going to check your vitals. After all, we have to make sure you’re as healthy as you are adorable.”

I blushed at the compliment; knowing it wouldn’t be the last time I’d be complimented like that. Older individuals loved to say how cute little kids were, especially little girls. While Doctor Condon worked to take my blood pressure, I turned to Mom and said, “Tho what happenth now?”

“We’ll take you home so you can rest; Amy and Brian won’t come over until you’re ready to see them.”

“I wonder how they’ll feel theeing me ath a little girl.” A thought suddenly dawned on me, “What about my room? Ith not really appropriate for a girl my age.”

Mom and Kelsey shared an uncertain look with each other as Doctor Condon continued his work. After a few seconds, Mom looked at me and said, “The company hired some contractors to give your room a complete makeover.” Seeing the shocked look on my face, Mom continued, “Don’t worry; they simply put all your things in storage. When you get home, you’ll find your room is now age appropriate.”

I wasn’t thrilled by that news, but I knew it made sense. “Thath good, I guetth.” Looking at them, I said, “What about me? How are you going to explain the thudden appearance of a little girl?”

“Radeon thought of that as well, sis.” Looking at me, Kelsey said, “As far as everyone else is concerned; Kevin is attending a private school upstate, while you are a distant niece that Mom took in.”

“Wow, they really think of everything.”

Walking over to the counter to write down some information, Doctor Condon said, “That’s what we do; we take care of everything so you don’t have to.” Looking at me, he said, “Well Sophie, I’m happy to say that you’re perfectly healthy. You’re free to go home with your Mom and sister.”
1111111111111111111121111111.title: The Examination
